decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures and gaining card advantage through instant spells like Ephemerate and Faithful Mending. A key aspect of this deck is using Quantum Riddler to manipulate the top of your library and setting up powerful reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance to cheat out creatures like Griselbrand. Utilizing cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to disrupt your opponent's game plan, this deck aims to overwhelm your opponent with a powerful board presence and quick combos.

The key concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively control the board with efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, while using cheap spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to clear a path for damage. The deck also focuses on card selection and manipulation with cards like Preordain and Mishra's Bauble to ensure a consistent and powerful offense. Additionally, the deck runs a mix of lands to maximize mana efficiency and hand consistency, allowing for explosive turns and overwhelming the opponent.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature spells and utilizing various abilities to deal direct damage to the opponent. It includes powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, as well as support cards like Goblin Bombardment and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to control the board and push damage through. The deck also includes utility cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Thraben Charm to disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of speedy creatures and versatile spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly and efficiently.

This deck utilizes a combination of cards that enable the player to quickly fill their graveyard with important creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield for a powerful game-winning combo. Key cards like Faithless Looting, Unearth, and Persist help set up the reanimation strategy, while Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones provide strong threats once they are brought back. The deck also includes disruption in the form of discard spells like Thoughtseize and Inquisition of Kozilek to disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, while also disrupting their game plan with cards like Blood Moon and Static Prison. The deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence with cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while also having access to versatile removal and disruption spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm. The deck aims to close out the game quickly with a combination of direct damage and combat damage, utilizing Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory for additional reach and finishing power.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game while ramping up your mana to cheat out powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul and Ulamog. Through the Breach allows you to put them into play for a huge swing, while cards like Devourer of Destiny and Stock Up help you maintain control of the board. The use of Nulldrifter and Kozilek's Command provide card advantage and disruption, making it difficult for your opponent to mount a comeback. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm your opponent with massive threats while keeping them on the back foot with control elements.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with creatures like Hollow One, Vengevine, and Detective's Phoenix to maximize their potential. By utilizing cards like Faithless Looting and Burning Inquiry, the deck can quickly assemble a strong board presence. Marauding Mako and Blazing Rootwalla provide additional aggression, while cards like Bloodstained Mire and Sacred Foundry ensure consistent mana sources. The use of Lava Dart, Lightning Bolt, and Practiced Offense allow for additional damage and removal options. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast and powerful creatures.

This deck focuses on using instant reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance to cheat powerful creatures like Griselbrand into play from the graveyard. The deck also utilizes cards like Solitude and Faithful Mending to control the board and dig through the deck for combo pieces. By combining powerful reanimation spells with efficient removal and card draw, this deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and disruptive spells.

The deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures like Griselbrand by using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate. It also utilizes cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, cards like Faithful Mending and Solitude provide additional ways to manipulate the graveyard and protect key combo pieces. The deck aims to set up explosive plays and overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats while controlling the game with disruptive spells.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the necessary pieces to generate a massive amount of mana and search for key combo pieces, mainly Primeval Titan and Amulet of Vigor. By using cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Urza's Saga, the deck aims to ramp up quickly and efficiently to summon powerful creatures and overwhelm the opponent. With the ability to tutor for specific lands and combo pieces, the deck can create explosive turns and win the game through overwhelming board presence and resource advantage.

The deck focuses on generating mana quickly with Ruby Medallion and rituals, while using Ral, Monsoon Mage to deal damage and draw cards. The combo win condition revolves around casting Past in Flames to recur spells from the graveyard and finish off the opponent with a big Grapeshot. The deck also includes card draw and selection spells to find combo pieces efficiently. The inclusion of Wish allows for flexibility in finding specific cards from the sideboard to help achieve the combo. Hex Magic and Artist's Talent provide additional utility and protection for the combo.

This deck focuses on quickly bringing out powerful creatures like Hollow One and Detective's Phoenix while using cards like Burning Inquiry and Faithless Looting to fill up the graveyard and enable strong plays. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Marauding Mako and Lightning Bolt to control the board and keep the pressure on the opponent. Finally, cards like Fear of Missing Out and Moonshadow provide additional burst damage to close out the game quickly. The key strategy is to establish a strong board presence early and overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls. It also includes powerful spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to control the board and deal additional damage. The deck's mana base is optimized with fetch lands like Flooded Strand and Marsh Flats to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ranger-Captain of Eos provides additional utility and flexibility in different game situations. Overall, this deck aims to win the game swiftly through a combination of efficient creatures and versatile spells.

This deck focuses on utilizing powerful reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance to bring back high-impact creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier from the graveyard at instant speed. By combining this with interaction and protection spells like Force of Negation and Solitude, the deck aims to set up explosive combos and outvalue opponents through quick and unexpected plays. The inclusion of card selection and draw spells like Faithful Mending and Ephemerate helps to dig for combo pieces and ensure a consistent game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to ramp up mana quickly using Eldrazi Temple and Ugin's Labyrinth, in order to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, Ulamog, and Drowner of Truth. Control elements like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble help to disrupt opponents while Disciple of Freyalise and Fanatic of Rhonas assist in generating mana. Sowing Mycospawn and Fight Rigging provide additional utility and synergy with the deck's strategy. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with massive creatures and control the board with a combination of ramp and disruptive spells.

This deck focuses on using the combination of Broodscale, Devourer of Destiny, and Sowing Mycospawn to create a powerful synergy that can overwhelm opponents quickly. The use of Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Ancient Stirrings helps to ramp up the power of the combo, while control elements like Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command provide protection and disruption. The inclusion of cards like Dismember and Soul-Guide Lantern helps to deal with threats and maintain control of the game, making this a versatile and formidable combo deck.
